data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6 ✓ — Fixed 4 of 5 CI sub-issues: (1) removed dead test-evals job from ci.yml, (2) fixed SC2066 in check-model-id-lint.sh and SC2221/SC2222 in review-complexity-classifier.sh, (3) added skip guard for playwright-cli test, (4) added VALIDATE_SKIP_PLUGIN_CHECKS=1 env var for test isolation. Remaining: compute-diff-hash staging test has deeper issue beyond cache race (empty hash returned — may relate to da39-3f9e).
